modes.purpose: fan out N subagents on N independent problems with no shared state
modes.default_when: ≥2 independent failures or investigations and parallelism saves wall-clock time

modes.purpose: execute a plan task-by-task with fresh implementer per task and 2-stage review (spec compliance → code quality)
modes.default_when: executing a plan with ≥3 discrete tasks; tasks may share state; quality gates after each task

human_approval_required_for: starting work on main/master without explicit consent (mode sequential)
task escalation when plan itself is wrong (mode sequential, BLOCKED status)

fork_policy.all_modes: fork-by-design — every dispatched subagent runs in context: fork to keep main session clean and the subagent focused on its specific scope

compositions.stage_2_review_in_mode_sequential: may chain to devloop:code-review mode request when auto_review is enabled — same JSON verdict schema, consistent with phase verify code-review
